mapper.select: SELECT m.meetingId, m.title, m.content, s.name AS sportName, CONCAT(r.sido, ' ', r.sigungu, ' ', COALESCE(r.dong, '')) AS regionName, m.placeName, m.address, m.meetingDate, m.startTime, m.status, m.hostUserId, u.nickname AS hostNickname, lm.messageId AS lastMessageId, lm.content AS lastMessage, DATE_FORMAT(lm.createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS lastMessageAt FROM meetings m JOIN users u ON m.hostUserId = u.userId JOIN sports s ON m.sportId = s.sportId JOIN regions r ON m.regionId = r.regionId LEFT JOIN meetingChatMessages lm ON lm.messageId = ( SELECT cm.messageId FROM meetingChatMessages cm WHERE cm.meetingId = m.meetingId ORDER BY cm.createdAt DESC, cm.messageId DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE m.deletedAt IS NULL AND ( m.hostUserId = #{userId} OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM meetingParticipants mp WHERE mp.meetingId = m.meetingId AND mp.userId = #{userId} AND mp.status = 'APPROVED' AND mp.chatLeftAt IS NULL ) ) ORDER BY COALESCE(lm.createdAt, m.meetingDate, m.createdAt) DESC, m.meetingId DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetings WHERE meetingId = #{meetingId} AND deletedAt IS NULL AND status != 'CANCELLED' AND ( status != 'COMPLETED' OR updatedAt > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) )

SELECT recent.messageId, recent.meetingId, recent.userId, recent.nickname, recent.profileImage, recent.host, recent.content, recent.messageType, recent.createdAt FROM ( SELECT cm.messageId, cm.meetingId, cm.userId, u.nickname, u.profileImage, CASE WHEN cm.userId = m.hostUserId THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS host, cm.content, cm.messageType, cm.createdAt FROM meetingChatMessages cm JOIN users u ON cm.userId = u.userId JOIN meetings m ON cm.meetingId = m.meetingId LEFT JOIN meetingParticipants viewer ON viewer.meetingId = cm.meetingId AND viewer.userId = #{userId} WHERE cm.meetingId = #{meetingId} AND ( viewer.chatLeftAt IS NULL OR cm.createdAt > viewer.chatLeftAt ) ORDER BY cm.createdAt DESC, cm.messageId DESC LIMIT #{limit} ) recent ORDER BY recent.createdAt ASC, recent.messageId ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO meetingChatMessages( meetingId, userId, content, messageType ) VALUES( #{meetingId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{messageType} )
mapper.select: SELECT cm.messageId, cm.meetingId, cm.userId, u.nickname, u.profileImage, CASE WHEN cm.userId = m.hostUserId THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS host, cm.content, cm.messageType, cm.createdAt FROM meetingChatMessages cm JOIN users u ON cm.userId = u.userId JOIN meetings m ON cm.meetingId = m.meetingId WHERE cm.messageId = #{messageId}
